allow: PowerShell(npm install -g pnpm@9.15.0; Write-Output "=== npm prefix ==="; npm config get prefix; Write-Output "=== pnpm path ==="; \(Get-Command pnpm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "=== pnpm version ==="; pnpm --version)
PowerShell(pnpm exec turbo run lint typecheck test 2>&1)
PowerShell(pnpm exec turbo run lint typecheck test --output-logs=errors-only --force 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec eduforge_postgres psql -U eduforge -d eduforge -t -c "SELECT ocr_status, left\(sha256,16\) AS sha, size_bytes FROM source_files ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;")

PowerShell(docker exec eduforge_postgres psql -U eduforge -d eduforge -c "SELECT kind, round\(confidence::numeric,2\) AS conf, left\(content_md, 60\) AS content FROM content_blocks ORDER BY position LIMIT 4;")

PowerShell(docker exec eduforge_postgres psql -U eduforge -d eduforge -c "SELECT slug, status, access_mode, active_app_version_id IS NOT NULL AS has_active FROM projects WHERE slug='biologia-viva-demo';")

PowerShell(docker exec eduforge_postgres psql -U eduforge -d eduforge -c "SELECT type, difficulty FROM interactions i JOIN projects p ON p.id=i.project_id WHERE p.slug='biologia-viva-demo' ORDER BY i.position;")

PowerShell(docker exec eduforge_postgres psql -U eduforge -d eduforge -c "SELECT version_number, status, left\(bundle_sha512,20\) AS hash FROM app_versions av JOIN projects p ON p.id=av.project_id WHERE p.slug='biologia-viva-demo';")

PowerShell(docker exec eduforge_postgres psql -U eduforge -d eduforge -c "SELECT av.version_number, av.status, left\(av.bundle_sha512,20\) AS hash FROM app_versions av JOIN projects p ON p.id=av.project_id WHERE p.slug='biologia-viva-demo';")
PowerShell(docker exec eduforge_postgres psql -U eduforge -d eduforge -c "SELECT rolname, rolcanlogin FROM pg_roles WHERE rolname='eduforge_app';")

PowerShell(docker exec eduforge_postgres psql -U eduforge -d eduforge -c "SELECT grantee, privilege_type FROM information_schema.role_table_grants WHERE table_name='audit_logs' AND grantee='eduforge_app' ORDER BY privilege_type;")

PowerShell(docker exec eduforge_postgres psql -U eduforge -d eduforge -c "SELECT grantee, privilege_type FROM information_schema.role_table_grants WHERE table_name='app_versions' AND grantee='eduforge_app' ORDER BY privilege_type;")

PowerShell(docker exec eduforge_postgres psql -U eduforge -d eduforge -c "SELECT grantee, privilege_type FROM information_schema.role_table_grants WHERE table_name='projects' AND grantee='eduforge_app' ORDER BY privilege_type;")
Bash(pnpm --filter @eduforge/api exec vitest run src/creator src/admin src/interactions)
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter \\"Name = 'node.exe'\\" | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter \\"ProcessId = 2764\\" | Select-Object ProcessId, ParentProcessId, CreationDate, CommandLine | Format-List; Write-Output '---'; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter \\"ProcessId = 6580\\" | Select-Object ProcessId, ParentProcessId, CreationDate | Format-List")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3333 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess")

Bash(powershell -Command 'foreach \($p in 46052,6580,2764,8296,6704,29800\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3333,3334 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue')
Bash(curl -s -b cookies.txt -X POST http://localhost:3333/v1/api-keys -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"name":"Smoke test key","environment":"live","scopes":["projects:read","publish"]}')
Bash(powershell -Command "try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:3334/health -Method Get -TimeoutSec 5 | ConvertTo-Json } catch { Write-Output 'FAILED' }")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3333,3334 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter \\"Name = 'node.exe'\\" | Select-Object ProcessId, ParentProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List")

Bash(powershell -Command 'foreach \($p in 20092,40012,31560,34300,46800,45456\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name = '\\''node.exe'\\''" | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List')
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3333,3334,8899 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess")

Bash(powershell -Command "until \(\(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3333 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) -and \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3334 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)\) { Start-Sleep -Seconds 1 }; Write-Output 'BOTH_UP'")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3333 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3334 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"{p['id'][:8]}... {p['title']} slug={p['slug']}\\"\) for p in data[:3]]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"{p['id']} {p['title']} slug={p['slug']}\\"\) for p in data if 'biologia' in p['slug'].lower\(\) or 'demo' in p['slug'].lower\(\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"v{v['versionNumber']} active={v['active']} pub={v.get\('publishedAt','N/A'\)[:19]}\\"\) for v in data]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"{m['kind']}: {m['id'][:8]}...\\"\) for m in d]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"{m['kind']}: id={m['id'][:8]}... url={m['url'][:60]}...\\"\) for m in d]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\),**d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if 'anthropic' in k.lower\(\)]")

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($conn\) { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Killed process on 5173" } else { Write-Host "No process on 5173" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($conn\) { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Killed" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3333 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($conn\) { Write-Host "API PID: $\($conn.OwningProcess\)" } else { Write-Host "API NOT RUNNING on 3333" })
